message:
fix: demo uses local turboquant-wasm source, not npm

The demo installed turboquant-wasm@0.2.10 from npm which lacks WebGPU.
dotBatch() ran on CPU (35ms) while brute-force used local GPU code (3ms).

- Vite alias resolves turboquant-wasm to ../src/js/index.ts
- CI builds WASM + JS package before demo (generates turboquant-wasm.generated.ts)
- Added zig setup + lfs checkout to demo workflow
- Trigger demo deploy on src/ changes too

files.patch:
@@ -5,6 +5,7 @@ on:
     branches: [main]
     paths:
       - 'demo/**'
+      - 'src/**'
       - '.github/workflows/demo.yml'
   workflow_dispatch:
 
@@ -25,11 +26,20 @@ jobs:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          lfs: true
+
+      - uses: mlugg/setup-zig@v2
+        with:
+          version: 0.15.2
 
       - uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
         with:
           bun-version: latest
 
+      - name: Build WASM + JS package
+        run: bun run build
+
       - name: Install demo dependencies
         working-directory: demo
         run: bun install
